Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add remote button detection and automatic front trunk opening

- Add GPIO pins for car remote lock/unlock button press detection \(GPIO 18/19\)
- Implement automatic front trunk opening when remote unlock held for 1 second
- Update front trunk unlock pulse duration from 1s to 8s
- Add remote button states to API status response

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
